name: Grocery & Shopping List
description: Category-grouped list. Tap-to-check interaction (with strikethrough). Quantity stepper. Share list with family. Store aisle sorting. Barcode scan to add. Frequently bought suggestions.

psychology_triggers.name: Scarcity
psychology_triggers.implementation_mandate: Enforce Scarcity prominently in the main user flow.
psychology_triggers.anti_pattern: Ignoring Scarcity leads to high drop-off rates in this specific industry.
